goals.description: Execute final syntax and logic verification on the graded assignment to ensure zero defects before the 13:30 system lock.
goals.rationale: My 'achievement' value dictates that a perfect score is non-negotiable; any error risks permanent reputational damage. With the task at 90% completion and only ~5 minutes remaining, I cannot afford to negotiate extensions or delay for social obligations. My 'assertive' nature requires me to enforce this deadline strictly without seeking leniency. Sacrificing my current energy levels and skipping a meal is an acceptable trade-off because the long-term payoff of a flawless submission outweighs immediate comfort.

goals.description: Enforce total cognitive isolation by silencing all notifications from teammate_A, cohort_3, and general channels until submission is complete.
goals.rationale: Distractions directly erode my already constrained focus capacity (6). At this critical juncture, social closeness is secondary to academic integrity. Ignoring pending messages is an efficient allocation of resources, not rudeness; I will not compromise the quality of this deliverable for interaction. The risk of appearing unreliable is mitigated by delivering a completed product rather than half-finished work, which aligns with my need to maintain high trust in professional contexts.

goals.description: Immediately submit the assignment via the secure portal to lock in the grade before the 13:30 cutoff.
goals.rationale: Once the verification phase (g1) is confirmed as error-free, the act of submission becomes the primary driver of outcome realization. While still high importance, it logically follows the verification step. Deferring it slightly ensures I don't trigger the system lock prematurely if a critical fix emerges during the final minute of g1, though the window is tight.
